title: oxalis engleriana
intro: Oxalis engleriana, also known as the purple wood-sorrel, is a flowering plant species within the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Oxalis engleriana has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and acting as an antioxidant. It can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
